[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010100 3
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0001100 2
4 0000000 a
5 1010100 3
6 0000001 1
7 0001100 2

01 10 0001100 2 match 3 7
12 21 0010100 2
23 32 1010000 2
34 43 0000000 a match 1 2 4

67 76 0000001 1 match 6
70 07 0001101 3

13 31 0010000 1

36 63 0000001 1 match 6
47 74 0001100 2 match 3 7
50 05 0001100 2 match 3 7
61 16 0000000 a match 1 2 4
72 27 1010100 3 match 0 5

37 73 1010001 3
